snippet.title: Jean-Pascal Tricoire, Chairman & CEO Of Schneider Electric: Empowering The Future
snippet.description: As the world embraces a new age of digitalization and sustainable change, Schneider Electric is leading the way in global energy management and automation. Jean-Pascal Tricoire, Chairman & CEO of Schneider Electric, discusses his company’s mission to drive forward digital transformation, sustainability, and workplace inclusivity.

snippet.title: CEO Series: Assessing Schneider's Culture
snippet.description: Schneider's core values of safety, integrity, respect and excellence drive everything we do. In his latest CEO Series, our President and CEO Mark Rourke spoke with Angela Fish, our Executive Vice President of Human Resources at Schneider, to explain how these values built and continue to grow a strong company culture at Schneider.

snippet.title: Bidisha Nagaraj joins the good fight! Becomes a Green Yodha
snippet.description:
"How do we live without a strong instinct of being greedy about everything?" By being conscious of our resources. 

Bidisha Nagaraj, Vice President, Global Marketing explains how sustainability has an economic, environmental and social aspect to it. 
In our latest episode of 'Sustainability Under 120 Seconds', Bidisha shares her personal commitment towards a greener planet and how she is a Green Yodha in everyday life. 

#greenyodha is a #sustainability initiative by Schneider Electric that aims to build a community of conscious citizens and businesses to unite towards energy-efficient practices.

snippet.title: Pacific Knowledge Series: Our Sustainability Business | Schneider Electric
snippet.description:
The ‘Pacific Knowledge Series’ is an informative series of brief interviews, helping you understand Schneider's thought leadership themes, as well as the Pacific's strategic priorities. ►Watch more Sustainability Business videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLa7UGrWOTyjkm42do7NsDD2YMjYHwXejw

David Eastwood, Head of Sustainability Business (Australia), interviews Michael Cox, APAC Sustainability Consultancy Director, and Lisa Zembrodt, Director of Operations - Energy Markets (Australia) about our Sustainability Business in Pacific, and our leading role in solving the world’s energy challenges and delivering strategic and sustainable solutions for our customers.

►Click here to subscribe to Schneider Electric: https://www.youtube.com/c/schneiderelectric?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Walmart: Can the World’s Largest Retailer Keep Growing?
snippet.description:
You can’t talk about what it means to be a consumer without talking about Walmart. The company is now the world’s largest retailer—with more than 10,000 stores in 24 countries—but its growth story continues.

In the latest episode of Exceptional Leaders, Retail analyst Simeon Gutman sits down with Doug McMillon, President & CEO of Walmart, to talk about how the company pulled off one of the greatest omnichannel transformations in retail history and how it can continue to defy the law of large numbers.

Watch this discussion with Walmart’s CEO to learn about his vision for the future of retail.

https://mgstn.ly/3h5K8xD

snippet.title: Jean Laurent Bonnafé, co-Président du Comité de campagne de l'IHES
snippet.description: Intervention de Jean-Laurent Bonnafé, Administrateur Directeur Général de BNP Paribas et co-Président du Comité de campagne, lors de la cérémonie de clôture de la campagne de levée de fonds de l'IHES le 24 octobre 2022 à la Caisse des Dépôts.
